name: trello
description: Manage Trello boards, lists, and cards via the Trello REST API.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 trello 相關工作
幫我啟用 trello 這個 skill

examples.intent: Use the trello skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
